notes: IMPORTANT CORRECTION from prior assumption: earlier note said 'Jan 24-Feb 5 with grade exceptions' — verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11 from Jordan-specific sources (light-dark.net, almasdar.com, petra.gov.jo) that Jordan has NO grade-level staggering; all levels including Tawjihi follow one unified date. The 'grade exceptions' detail was actually Egypt's system bleeding into search results due to similar ministry terminology — content explicitly corrects this common confusion.

Verified two consecutive years: current academic year break Jan 24 - Feb 5 (2 weeks); confirmed next academic year Jan 23 - Feb 4 via Jordan's official news agency (Petra), term 2 starts Feb 6, year ends Jun 24.
